subcodes.first_line: The candle in its burning and the heart in its melting—it remaineth unknown what causeth this and wherefore it hath come to pass. Some there are who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شمع در سوز و دل در گداز معلوم نه که سبب این چه و علت آن کدام قومی بر آنند
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @fire and light; fire and water, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @love as fire, @spiritual transformation
